ThingDef.label: VEL 46 (MP7)
ThingDef.description: An extremely compact automatic weapon designed for high mobility and close-quarters effectiveness. Its lightweight construction and controllable rate of fire allow rapid engagement in confined environments while maintaining precision and reliability in a small platform.

ThingDef.label: VEL 46 INF (MP7)
ThingDef.description: An extremely compact automatic weapon designed for high mobility and close-quarters effectiveness. Its lightweight construction and controllable rate of fire allow rapid engagement in confined environments while maintaining precision and reliability in a small platform. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: VEL 46 CQC (MP7)
ThingDef.description: An extremely compact automatic weapon designed for high mobility and close-quarters effectiveness. Its lightweight construction and controllable rate of fire allow rapid engagement in confined environments while maintaining precision and reliability in a small platform. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: VEL 46 SF (MP7)
ThingDef.description: An extremely compact automatic weapon designed for high mobility and close-quarters effectiveness. Its lightweight construction and controllable rate of fire allow rapid engagement in confined environments while maintaining precision and reliability in a small platform. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: VEL 46 THM (MP7)
ThingDef.description: An extremely compact automatic weapon designed for high mobility and close-quarters effectiveness. Its lightweight construction and controllable rate of fire allow rapid engagement in confined environments while maintaining precision and reliability in a small platform. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: VEL 46 IAR (MP7)
ThingDef.description: An extremely compact automatic weapon designed for high mobility and close-quarters effectiveness. Its lightweight construction and controllable rate of fire allow rapid engagement in confined environments while maintaining precision and reliability in a small platform. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: MX9 (AUG Para)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun variant of the STB(AUG) platform, adapted to fire 9mm ammunition in a bullpup configuration. Its shortened profile and controllable automatic fire make it well suited for close-quarters engagements while retaining the platform’s integrated design and compact handling.

ThingDef.label: MX9 INF (AUG Para)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun variant of the STB(AUG) platform, adapted to fire 9mm ammunition in a bullpup configuration. Its shortened profile and controllable automatic fire make it well suited for close-quarters engagements while retaining the platform’s integrated design and compact handling. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: MX9 CQC (AUG Para)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun variant of the STB(AUG) platform, adapted to fire 9mm ammunition in a bullpup configuration. Its shortened profile and controllable automatic fire make it well suited for close-quarters engagements while retaining the platform’s integrated design and compact handling. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: MX9 SF (AUG Para)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun variant of the STB(AUG) platform, adapted to fire 9mm ammunition in a bullpup configuration. Its shortened profile and controllable automatic fire make it well suited for close-quarters engagements while retaining the platform’s integrated design and compact handling. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: MX9 THM (AUG Para)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun variant of the STB(AUG) platform, adapted to fire 9mm ammunition in a bullpup configuration. Its shortened profile and controllable automatic fire make it well suited for close-quarters engagements while retaining the platform’s integrated design and compact handling. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: MX9 IAR (AUG Para)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun variant of the STB(AUG) platform, adapted to fire 9mm ammunition in a bullpup configuration. Its shortened profile and controllable automatic fire make it well suited for close-quarters engagements while retaining the platform’s integrated design and compact handling. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Sub (MP5A4)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun built around a roller-delayed operating system, delivering smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire. Its balanced design and consistent performance made it a long-standing choice for close-quarters engagements and specialized operations.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Sub INF (MP5A4)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun built around a roller-delayed operating system, delivering smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire. Its balanced design and consistent performance made it a long-standing choice for close-quarters engagements and specialized operations. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Sub CQC (MP5A4)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun built around a roller-delayed operating system, delivering smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire. Its balanced design and consistent performance made it a long-standing choice for close-quarters engagements and specialized operations. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Sub SF (MP5A4)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun built around a roller-delayed operating system, delivering smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire. Its balanced design and consistent performance made it a long-standing choice for close-quarters engagements and specialized operations. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Sub THM (MP5A4)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun built around a roller-delayed operating system, delivering smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire. Its balanced design and consistent performance made it a long-standing choice for close-quarters engagements and specialized operations. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Sub IAR (MP5A4)
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun built around a roller-delayed operating system, delivering smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire. Its balanced design and consistent performance made it a long-standing choice for close-quarters engagements and specialized operations. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: Vaznev 9K (PP-19 Vityaz)
ThingDef.description: Developed from a rifle-based platform and adapted for 9mm operation, this design emphasizes durability and straightforward construction. Its controllable automatic fire and reliable feeding system make it well suited for close-range engagements and consistent service use.

ThingDef.label: Vaznev 9K INF (PP-19 Vityaz)
ThingDef.description: Developed from a rifle-based platform and adapted for 9mm operation, this design emphasizes durability and straightforward construction. Its controllable automatic fire and reliable feeding system make it well suited for close-range engagements and consistent service use. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Vaznev 9K CQC (PP-19 Vityaz)
ThingDef.description: Developed from a rifle-based platform and adapted for 9mm operation, this design emphasizes durability and straightforward construction. Its controllable automatic fire and reliable feeding system make it well suited for close-range engagements and consistent service use. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Vaznev 9K SF (PP-19 Vityaz)
ThingDef.description: Developed from a rifle-based platform and adapted for 9mm operation, this design emphasizes durability and straightforward construction. Its controllable automatic fire and reliable feeding system make it well suited for close-range engagements and consistent service use. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Vaznev 9K THM (PP-19 Vityaz)
ThingDef.description: Developed from a rifle-based platform and adapted for 9mm operation, this design emphasizes durability and straightforward construction. Its controllable automatic fire and reliable feeding system make it well suited for close-range engagements and consistent service use. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: FSS Hurricane (AR-57)
ThingDef.description: A hybrid weapon system that combines a rifle-style platform with a top-mounted magazine and downward ejection system. Chambered for a high-velocity cartridge, its design allows large ammunition capacity while maintaining controllable automatic fire and a streamlined profile.

ThingDef.label: FSS Hurricane INF (AR-57)
ThingDef.description: A hybrid weapon system that combines a rifle-style platform with a top-mounted magazine and downward ejection system. Chambered for a high-velocity cartridge, its design allows large ammunition capacity while maintaining controllable automatic fire and a streamlined profile. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: FSS Hurricane CQC (AR-57)
ThingDef.description: A hybrid weapon system that combines a rifle-style platform with a top-mounted magazine and downward ejection system. Chambered for a high-velocity cartridge, its design allows large ammunition capacity while maintaining controllable automatic fire and a streamlined profile. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: FSS Hurricane SF (AR-57)
ThingDef.description: A hybrid weapon system that combines a rifle-style platform with a top-mounted magazine and downward ejection system. Chambered for a high-velocity cartridge, its design allows large ammunition capacity while maintaining controllable automatic fire and a streamlined profile. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: FSS Hurricane THM (AR-57)
ThingDef.description: A hybrid weapon system that combines a rifle-style platform with a top-mounted magazine and downward ejection system. Chambered for a high-velocity cartridge, its design allows large ammunition capacity while maintaining controllable automatic fire and a streamlined profile. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Minibak (PP-19 Bizon)
ThingDef.description: Designed with a distinctive helical magazine mounted beneath the barrel, this submachine gun prioritizes high ammunition capacity in a compact package. Its simple operating system and controllable automatic fire support sustained close-range engagements without frequent reloads.

ThingDef.label: Minibak INF (PP-19 Bizon)
ThingDef.description: Designed with a distinctive helical magazine mounted beneath the barrel, this submachine gun prioritizes high ammunition capacity in a compact package. Its simple operating system and controllable automatic fire support sustained close-range engagements without frequent reloads. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Minibak CQC (PP-19 Bizon)
ThingDef.description: Designed with a distinctive helical magazine mounted beneath the barrel, this submachine gun prioritizes high ammunition capacity in a compact package. Its simple operating system and controllable automatic fire support sustained close-range engagements without frequent reloads. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Minibak SF (PP-19 Bizon)
ThingDef.description: Designed with a distinctive helical magazine mounted beneath the barrel, this submachine gun prioritizes high ammunition capacity in a compact package. Its simple operating system and controllable automatic fire support sustained close-range engagements without frequent reloads. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Minibak THM (PP-19 Bizon)
ThingDef.description: Designed with a distinctive helical magazine mounted beneath the barrel, this submachine gun prioritizes high ammunition capacity in a compact package. Its simple operating system and controllable automatic fire support sustained close-range engagements without frequent reloads. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: PDSW 528 (P90 Mod)
ThingDef.description: Built around a lightweight polymer frame and a compact bullpup layout, this weapon uses a top-mounted magazine system that feeds rounds horizontally before chambering. Its streamlined design and high-capacity configuration support controlled automatic fire in confined environments while maintaining low overall weight.

ThingDef.label: PDSW 528 INF (P90 Mod)
ThingDef.description: Built around a lightweight polymer frame and a compact bullpup layout, this weapon uses a top-mounted magazine system that feeds rounds horizontally before chambering. Its streamlined design and high-capacity configuration support controlled automatic fire in confined environments while maintaining low overall weight. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: PDSW 528 CQC (P90 Mod)
ThingDef.description: Built around a lightweight polymer frame and a compact bullpup layout, this weapon uses a top-mounted magazine system that feeds rounds horizontally before chambering. Its streamlined design and high-capacity configuration support controlled automatic fire in confined environments while maintaining low overall weight. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: PDSW 528 SF (P90 Mod)
ThingDef.description: Built around a lightweight polymer frame and a compact bullpup layout, this weapon uses a top-mounted magazine system that feeds rounds horizontally before chambering. Its streamlined design and high-capacity configuration support controlled automatic fire in confined environments while maintaining low overall weight. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: PDSW 528 THM (P90 Mod)
ThingDef.description: Built around a lightweight polymer frame and a compact bullpup layout, this weapon uses a top-mounted magazine system that feeds rounds horizontally before chambering. Its streamlined design and high-capacity configuration support controlled automatic fire in confined environments while maintaining low overall weight. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Fennec 45 (Vector 45)
ThingDef.description: Built around an unconventional recoil-mitigation system, this weapon redirects internal forces downward to reduce muzzle rise during automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its design emphasizes controllability and rapid follow-up shots in close-range engagements while maintaining a compact and modern layout.

ThingDef.label: Fennec 45 INF (Vector 45)
ThingDef.description: Built around an unconventional recoil-mitigation system, this weapon redirects internal forces downward to reduce muzzle rise during automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its design emphasizes controllability and rapid follow-up shots in close-range engagements while maintaining a compact and modern layout. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Fennec 45 CQC (Vector 45)
ThingDef.description: Built around an unconventional recoil-mitigation system, this weapon redirects internal forces downward to reduce muzzle rise during automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its design emphasizes controllability and rapid follow-up shots in close-range engagements while maintaining a compact and modern layout. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Fennec 45 SF (Vector 45)
ThingDef.description: Built around an unconventional recoil-mitigation system, this weapon redirects internal forces downward to reduce muzzle rise during automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its design emphasizes controllability and rapid follow-up shots in close-range engagements while maintaining a compact and modern layout. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Fennec 45 THM (Vector 45)
ThingDef.description: Built around an unconventional recoil-mitigation system, this weapon redirects internal forces downward to reduce muzzle rise during automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its design emphasizes controllability and rapid follow-up shots in close-range engagements while maintaining a compact and modern layout. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Fennec 45 IAR (Vector 45)
ThingDef.description: Built around an unconventional recoil-mitigation system, this weapon redirects internal forces downward to reduce muzzle rise during automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its design emphasizes controllability and rapid follow-up shots in close-range engagements while maintaining a compact and modern layout. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: BAS-P (MPX)
ThingDef.description: Designed as a modular submachine gun platform, it incorporates a closed‑bolt operating system and modern materials to enhance precision and reliability. Its balanced layout and controllable automatic fire support accurate engagement in close‑range environments while allowing flexible configuration with contemporary accessories.

ThingDef.label: BAS-P INF (MPX)
ThingDef.description: Designed as a modular submachine gun platform, it incorporates a closed‑bolt operating system and modern materials to enhance precision and reliability. Its balanced layout and controllable automatic fire support accurate engagement in close‑range environments while allowing flexible configuration with contemporary accessories. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: BAS-P CQC (MPX)
ThingDef.description: Designed as a modular submachine gun platform, it incorporates a closed‑bolt operating system and modern materials to enhance precision and reliability. Its balanced layout and controllable automatic fire support accurate engagement in close‑range environments while allowing flexible configuration with contemporary accessories. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: BAS-P SF (MPX)
ThingDef.description: Designed as a modular submachine gun platform, it incorporates a closed‑bolt operating system and modern materials to enhance precision and reliability. Its balanced layout and controllable automatic fire support accurate engagement in close‑range environments while allowing flexible configuration with contemporary accessories. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: BAS-P THM (MPX)
ThingDef.description: Designed as a modular submachine gun platform, it incorporates a closed‑bolt operating system and modern materials to enhance precision and reliability. Its balanced layout and controllable automatic fire support accurate engagement in close‑range environments while allowing flexible configuration with contemporary accessories. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: BAS-P IAR (MPX)
ThingDef.description: Designed as a modular submachine gun platform, it incorporates a closed‑bolt operating system and modern materials to enhance precision and reliability. Its balanced layout and controllable automatic fire support accurate engagement in close‑range environments while allowing flexible configuration with contemporary accessories. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: ISO-45 (APC45P)
ThingDef.description: Engineered around a compact pistol‑caliber platform, this weapon emphasizes precision manufacturing and controlled automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its reinforced construction and balanced layout support reliable performance in close‑range engagements while maintaining a modern, streamlined design.

ThingDef.label: ISO-45 INF (APC45P)
ThingDef.description: Engineered around a compact pistol‑caliber platform, this weapon emphasizes precision manufacturing and controlled automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its reinforced construction and balanced layout support reliable performance in close‑range engagements while maintaining a modern, streamlined design. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: ISO-45 CQC (APC45P)
ThingDef.description: Engineered around a compact pistol‑caliber platform, this weapon emphasizes precision manufacturing and controlled automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its reinforced construction and balanced layout support reliable performance in close‑range engagements while maintaining a modern, streamlined design. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: ISO-45 SF (APC45P)
ThingDef.description: Engineered around a compact pistol‑caliber platform, this weapon emphasizes precision manufacturing and controlled automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its reinforced construction and balanced layout support reliable performance in close‑range engagements while maintaining a modern, streamlined design. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: ISO-45 THM (APC45P)
ThingDef.description: Engineered around a compact pistol‑caliber platform, this weapon emphasizes precision manufacturing and controlled automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its reinforced construction and balanced layout support reliable performance in close‑range engagements while maintaining a modern, streamlined design. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: ISO-45 IAR (APC45P)
ThingDef.description: Engineered around a compact pistol‑caliber platform, this weapon emphasizes precision manufacturing and controlled automatic fire. Chambered in .45 ACP, its reinforced construction and balanced layout support reliable performance in close‑range engagements while maintaining a modern, streamlined design. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: ISO 9MM (APC9K)
ThingDef.description: Engineered with a shortened frame and reinforced construction, this design emphasizes maneuverability in confined environments. Chambered in 9mm, it delivers controllable automatic fire and dependable operation while maintaining a compact, modern layout.

ThingDef.label: ISO 9MM INF (APC9K)
ThingDef.description: Engineered with a shortened frame and reinforced construction, this design emphasizes maneuverability in confined environments. Chambered in 9mm, it delivers controllable automatic fire and dependable operation while maintaining a compact, modern layout. INF stands for Infatry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: ISO 9MM CQC (APC9K)
ThingDef.description: Engineered with a shortened frame and reinforced construction, this design emphasizes maneuverability in confined environments. Chambered in 9mm, it delivers controllable automatic fire and dependable operation while maintaining a compact, modern layout. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: ISO 9MM SF (APC9K)
ThingDef.description: Engineered with a shortened frame and reinforced construction, this design emphasizes maneuverability in confined environments. Chambered in 9mm, it delivers controllable automatic fire and dependable operation while maintaining a compact, modern layout. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: ISO 9MM THM (APC9K)
ThingDef.description: Engineered with a shortened frame and reinforced construction, this design emphasizes maneuverability in confined environments. Chambered in 9mm, it delivers controllable automatic fire and dependable operation while maintaining a compact, modern layout. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Shroud (MP5SD)
ThingDef.description: Featuring an integrated suppression system and a ported barrel, this design reduces muzzle report and projectile velocity to minimize acoustic signature. Its operating system provides smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire, supporting discreet close‑range engagements.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Shroud INF (MP5SD)
ThingDef.description: Featuring an integrated suppression system and a ported barrel, this design reduces muzzle report and projectile velocity to minimize acoustic signature. Its operating system provides smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire, supporting discreet close‑range engagements. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Shroud CQC (MP5SD)
ThingDef.description: Featuring an integrated suppression system and a ported barrel, this design reduces muzzle report and projectile velocity to minimize acoustic signature. Its operating system provides smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire, supporting discreet close‑range engagements. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Shroud SF (MP5SD)
ThingDef.description: Featuring an integrated suppression system and a ported barrel, this design reduces muzzle report and projectile velocity to minimize acoustic signature. Its operating system provides smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire, supporting discreet close‑range engagements. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann Shroud THM (MP5SD)
ThingDef.description: Featuring an integrated suppression system and a ported barrel, this design reduces muzzle report and projectile velocity to minimize acoustic signature. Its operating system provides smooth recoil and controlled automatic fire, supporting discreet close‑range engagements. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.
